title: XPStats
description: Adds a keybind that replaces your XP Bar and toggles through useful PVP stats like your exact HP (decimal precision), gapple count and many useful infos
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a76a9fb9173dee9397914f1087e8c59ce49c3aa.png) A clean, toggleable PvP overlay that replaces your XP bar with precise, real-time combat stats. ## ⚡ Features > **🔁 Toggleable Overlay (Keybind)** - Fully customizable keybind in controls: - Cycle keybind that cycles between following different modes - Keybinds for each mode that switches to that exact mode instantly (unset by default) -------------------------------------- > **❤️ Exact Health Display** - Shows precise HP - Smart formatting: - ≥ 3 HP → 1 decimal (e.g. 17.4) - < 3 HP → 2 decimals (e.g. 2.87) > **🍎 Gapple Counter** - Tracks number of golden apples in your inventory > **🌀 Totem Counter** - Tracks number of totems of undying in your inventory > **🏹 Arrow Counter** - Tracks number of arrows in your inventory

ㅤ ## 🖼️ UI Design > **🧾 Minimal & Clean UI** - Seamlessly replaces the XP bar - Doesn’t clutter your screen - Designed for competitive PvP > **🎯 PvP-Focused** - Only shows info you actually need - No useless visual spam ## ⚙️ Technical Details - Built for Fabric - Lightweight, no performance impact - Client-side only - Uses Minecraft HUD rendering
